scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run db:ensure && next dev --webpack
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run db:ensure && next start
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: bash -c 'ENV_FILE=".env.${NODE_ENV:-development}"; export $(grep -v ^# $ENV_FILE | xargs) && npx prisma migrate deploy'
scripts.db:migrate: cross-env NODE_ENV=development bash -c 'ENV_FILE=".env.${NODE_ENV:-development}"; export $(grep -v ^# $ENV_FILE | xargs) && npx prisma migrate dev'
scripts.db:studio: cross-env NODE_ENV=development bash -c 'ENV_FILE=".env.${NODE_ENV:-development}"; export $(grep -v ^# $ENV_FILE | xargs) && npx prisma studio'
scripts.db:reset: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npx prisma migrate reset --force && npm run db:init:safe
scripts.kb:logs: bash -c 'ENV_FILE=".env.${NODE_ENV:-development}"; source $ENV_FILE 2>/dev/null || true; LOG_DIR=${KB_LOG_DIR:-logs/knowledge-base}; LOG_FILE=${KB_LOG_FILE:-kb-audit.log}; tail -n 100 "$LOG_DIR/$LOG_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo "日志文件不存在，请先运行 npm run kb:sync"'
scripts.kb:logs:clear: bash -c 'ENV_FILE=".env.${NODE_ENV:-development}"; source $ENV_FILE 2>/dev/null || true; LOG_DIR=${KB_LOG_DIR:-logs/knowledge-base}; LOG_FILE=${KB_LOG_FILE:-kb-audit.log}; > "$LOG_DIR/$LOG_FILE" 2>/dev/null && echo "日志已清空" || echo "日志文件不存在"'
scripts.agent:logs: bash -c 'ENV_FILE=".env.${NODE_ENV:-development}"; source $ENV_FILE 2>/dev/null || true; LOG_DIR=${AGENT_LOG_DIR:-logs/agent}; LOG_FILE=${AGENT_LOG_FILE:-agent-audit.log}; tail -n 100 "$LOG_DIR/$LOG_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo "日志文件不存在，请先发送聊天消息"'
scripts.agent:logs:clear: bash -c 'ENV_FILE=".env.${NODE_ENV:-development}"; source $ENV_FILE 2>/dev/null || true; LOG_DIR=${AGENT_LOG_DIR:-logs/agent}; LOG_FILE=${AGENT_LOG_FILE:-agent-audit.log}; > "$LOG_DIR/$LOG_FILE" 2>/dev/null && echo "日志已清空" || echo "日志文件不存在"'
